case_title: VALENTINA WALLACE VS. VALENTINA YASINSKY D.D.S., INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-11-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-11-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
